assertions.text: Contains a concrete analogy using familiar real-world concepts (not just technical metaphors)
Explicitly states where the analogy breaks down or stops working
Includes a visual (tldraw canvas, Mermaid diagram, or structured visual format)
The visual teaches something the text alone does not (not just restating words as shapes)
Has layered structure progressing from simple to detailed (one-liner -> analogy -> detail)
Includes curated external links with descriptions of why each is worth clicking
Technical terms are introduced only after being tied to the analogy or a familiar concept
No single section introduces more than 4 new concepts before consolidating
References the specific code snippet provided (mentions actual lines, function names, or variables from the code)
